stories.title: Red Sox Doubleheader Today — Two Cracks at Franchise History
stories.angle: The rainout inadvertently gave Boston maximum drama — two cracks at two different milestones, same day, same opponent. The franchise record can be tied and broken in a single afternoon-evening.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Boston's streak is at 14.

Tuesday's game was rained out. Now there are two games on Wednesday.

Game 1: Win ties the 1946 franchise record at 15.
Game 2: Win breaks it outright at 16.

The rainout created the best possible storyline. #RedSox

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The 2018 Red Sox won 108 games. Their longest win streak that year: 10 games.

The 2026 Red Sox have won 14 in a row. Today they get two chances to make franchise history.

Franchise record is 15, set in 1946. #RedSox #MLB

article.headline: Two Games. Two Milestones. The Red Sox Franchise Record Is One Win Away.

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Nolan Arenado's 2,000th Hit — A Hall of Fame Calling Card
stories.angle: The 2,000-hit/350-HR/10-Gold-Glove club is the most elite statistical argument for Arenado's Hall of Fame case. Every member is already in Cooperstown.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
On July 20, Nolan Arenado hit a double off Oakland for his 2,000th career hit.

Players with 2,000+ hits, 350+ HRs, and 10+ Gold Gloves: Griffey Jr., Willie Mays, Mike Schmidt, Johnny Bench, Al Kaline.

All five are in the Hall of Fame. #MLB

article.headline: The Six-Player Club. The Five Hall of Famers. And Nolan Arenado.

stories.title: Ohtani Knee — Bullpen Session Expected This Weekend, Cy Young in Jeopardy
stories.angle: Ohtani's Cy Young window is closing with every missed start. The bullpen session this weekend will be the defining moment for whether he returns in time to rebuild his case.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani won't start for at least another week to 10 days.

Bullpen session expected around July 25-26. Not on the IL. Continuing as DH.

Before the knee: 8-2, 1.79 ERA, 95 K in 85.2 IP. The Cy Young case isn't over, but it's eroding. #Dodgers

article.headline: One Week to Ten Days. That's How Long Ohtani Is Out. That's How Long His Cy Young Case Waits.

stories.title: Skubal Trade Flip — "Growing Sense" Tigers Keep Him
stories.angle: The biggest trade-deadline story of the summer is now about whether there's a deal at all. That flip is more interesting than another "five teams interested" update.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
A week ago, Tarik Skubal was the biggest trade-deadline chip in baseball.

Now the growing sense is Detroit keeps him.

Tigers are 10-4 in July, within 5-6 games of a Wild Card. August 3 is 12 days away. #Tigers #MLB

article.headline: Detroit Is Hot in July. Skubal Wants to Stay. The Asking Price Is Outrageous. This Deal Might Not Happen.

stories.title: White Sox Lose Kyle Teel — AL Central Lead at Risk
stories.angle: The White Sox went 121-41 two years ago (worst MLB record ever), 60-102 last year, and are now leading the AL Central at 52-46. This injury tests whether the rebuild is real or fragile.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kyle Teel is on the 10-day IL with a high ankle sprain. Recovery: 6-12 weeks.

The White Sox are 52-46, leading the AL Central.

Two seasons ago they lost 121 games. This injury tests whether the rebuild is real. #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: The White Sox Lost 121 Games Two Years Ago. Now They Lead the AL Central. Kyle Teel's Injury Is the First Real Test.
